senses.definition: a type of herbaceous plant with greenish-yellow flowers and edible leaves and stems, commonly found in coastal regions

examples.x: The chef added a handful of chopped Alexanders to the salad.

senses.definition: a herb with blue-purple flowers, known for its medicinal and soothing properties

examples.x: I brewed a cup of alkanet tea, enjoying its calming effect and vibrant color.
She sprinkled dried alkanet petals in her bathwater, turning it into a relaxing and visually appealing soak.

senses.definition: a herbaceous plant known for its aromatic and medicinal properties

examples.x: He brewed a cup of soothing angelica tea to help calm his nerves after a long day.
They garnished their summer cocktails with a sprig of fresh angelica.

senses.definition: a genus of aromatic plants commonly known as mugworts or wormwoods

examples.x: As the wind blew gently, the silver-gray leaves of artemisia danced in the breeze.
The subtle bitterness of artemisia balanced the sweetness of the dessert.

senses.definition: a plant of the mint family with aromatic leaves that are eaten raw or cooked

examples.x: Among all herbs, basil is my favorite.
She visited the farmer's market and bought a bunch of fresh basil.
With a touch of creativity, I added basil as a garnish to my fruit salad.

senses.definition: the scented dried leaves of the bay tree, used in cooking

examples.x: She picked a fresh bay leaf from her herb garden and placed it on top of her roasted chicken.

senses.definition: a Mediterranean herb that is obtained from a plant with purple flowers and hairy leaves that are used in salads

examples.x: He admired the vibrant blue flowers of borage in his garden, attracting bees and butterflies.
She harvested fresh borage leaves and used them as a garnish for her summer salads.

senses.definition: the fresh green leaves of a plant of the parsley family that is used in cooking

examples.x: We sprinkled chervil over our roasted vegetables, elevating their taste with a hint of herbaceous goodness.
You can mix chervil with butter and spread it on freshly baked bread for a simple yet delicious appetizer.

senses.definition: a blue-flowered herb of the daisy family, the root of which can be used with coffee and the leaves of which eaten in a salad

examples.x: It reminded her of her childhood when her grandmother used to cook chicory with bacon.

senses.definition: the slender leaves of a plant closely related to the onion, with purple flowers, that is used as a culinary herb

examples.x: He carefully snipped a few chives from the herb garden to garnish his omelette.
He chopped some chives and mixed them into his sour cream.
My mother planted chives in her kitchen windowsill, ensuring a fresh supply of this versatile herb for her cooking.

senses.definition: a leafy herb that has a strong and slightly sour taste

examples.x: She added fresh cilantro to the salad.
He chopped cilantro for the salsa.
Some people dislike the taste of cilantro.

senses.definition: an herb known for its soothing aroma and potential therapeutic properties

examples.x: She carefully placed a few drops of clary sage essential oil into the diffuser, filling the room with its calming aroma.
They visited a local herb garden and were delighted to discover a thriving patch of clary sage.

senses.definition: the dried brown flower bud of a tropical tree that is used as a spice

examples.x: Chewing on a clove can help alleviate a toothache.
He popped a clove into his mouth to freshen his breath after a flavorful meal.

senses.definition: a scented herb of the parsley family, the leaves and seeds of which are used in cooking to add flavor to the food

examples.x: She chopped fresh coriander leaves and added them to the salad for a refreshing twist.
She discovered a new recipe that called for coriander as a key ingredient.
You can use coriander as a garnish for your tacos to add a burst of freshness.

senses.definition: an aromatic herb known for its minty fragrance and medicinal properties

examples.x: The chef sprinkled a pinch of dried costmary over the roasted vegetables to enhance their taste and presentation.

senses.definition: a scented annual herb of the parsley family used as a culinary or medicinal herb

examples.x: The dill seasoning blended perfectly with the creamy sauce of the chicken pasta.
They used dill as a key ingredient in their pickling recipe.

senses.definition: a plant with feathery leaves and a round thick stem, used as a vegetable or for adding flavor to food

examples.x: He discovered that fennel tea helped soothe his upset stomach.
I love using fennel in my recipes as it adds a unique and pleasant smell to the dish.
We discovered that fennel not only enhances the flavor but also provides digestive benefits.

senses.definition: a type of vegetable having a strong smell and spicy flavor that is used in cooking

examples.x: She added minced garlic to the pan for extra flavor.
The pasta sauce tasted rich with the addition of garlic and herbs.

senses.definition: a herbaceous plant with aromatic leaves and small purple flowers, often used for culinary and medicinal purposes

examples.x: He carefully harvested the hyssop from his garden and dried the leaves to make a soothing tea.
They infused hyssop in olive oil and used it as a natural remedy for skin irritations.

senses.definition: a type of plant with purple flowers and a fine smell

examples.x: She planted lavender in her garden to enjoy its pleasant aroma and vibrant color.
The herbalist recommended lavender for its calming properties and soothing fragrance.
She added a few sprigs of lavender to the bouquet for a touch of elegance and fragrance.
The lavender in the pot had grown tall and lush over the summer.
Lavender is often used in cooking and herbal remedies for its soothing properties.

senses.definition: a herb known for its lemony fragrance and soothing properties

examples.x: She enjoys adding lemon balm to her tea for a refreshing and calming experience.
They sprinkle lemon balm leaves on their summer salads to add a citrusy twist to the dish.

senses.definition: a sweet black strong-tasting substance produced from the root of a plant, which is used to make sweets or in medicine

examples.x: She loved the sweet taste of licorice, and she always kept a bag of licorice candies in her purse.
They were feeling a bit under the weather, so they brewed a cup of licorice tea to soothe their sore throat.

senses.definition: a Southern European herb of the parsley family with edible leaves and stem

examples.x: She visited a local herb shop and picked up a small bunch of lovage.
They gathered around the dinner table, savoring a delicious roasted chicken seasoned with a lovage rub.

senses.definition: a scented herb of the mint family, native to Southern Europe and used in cooking

examples.x: They harvested the marjoram leaves from their garden and used them to infuse oil for salad dressings.
We decided to garnish our grilled vegetables with chopped marjoram to elevate their taste.

senses.definition: a resin obtained from the tree of the same name, used for various culinary and medicinal purposes
an aromatic plant that grows in temperate regions, the leaves of which are used in cooking

examples.x: She loves the refreshing taste of mint in her iced tea on a hot summer day.
They use mint leaves to garnish their chocolate chip ice cream for a delightful contrast.

senses.definition: a pungent herb commonly used for its distinctive flavor and aroma

examples.x: She tossed mustard sprouts into her salad for a crunchy texture and a hint of spiciness.

senses.definition: a scented wild plant of the marjoram family, the leaves of which are used in cooking

examples.x: The aroma of oregano filled the kitchen as it simmered in the tomato soup.
You can't go wrong with oregano when making spaghetti sauce.

senses.definition: an aromatic plant with curly green leaves, used for garnishing food or in cooking

examples.x: He garnished his pasta dish with freshly chopped parsley to add a vibrant touch of green.
My mother always sprinkles some dried parsley into the soup to enhance its flavor.
She harvested a bunch of parsley from her rooftop garden.
The recipe calls for a handful of finely chopped parsley.

senses.definition: a plant with small, aromatic leaves and tiny, purplish flowers used for various purposes, including culinary, medicinal, and insect repellent

examples.x: She gathered some fresh pennyroyal from her garden to add a fragrant touch to her homemade tea.

senses.definition: a fragrant herb with a refreshing taste commonly used in culinary and medicinal applications

examples.x: He enjoyed a soothing cup of peppermint tea before bedtime, which helped him relax and unwind.
We harvested fresh peppermint from our garden and used it to make a refreshing summer salad dressing.

senses.definition: a herbaceous plant with aromatic leaves commonly used in Asian cuisine

examples.x: She sprinkled chopped perilla leaves on top of her sushi roll for added flavor.
The vibrant green color of perilla leaves adds an attractive touch to any dish.

senses.definition: a succulent herb with fleshy leaves, commonly used in salads and culinary dishes

examples.x: She picked some fresh purslane from her garden and added it to her summer salad.
They bought a bunch of purslane from the farmer's market and used it as a garnish for their soup.

senses.definition: a bitter-tasting herb derived from the bark of the Quassia tree and is often used as a natural remedy for digestive issues

examples.x: I heard that quassia can be used as a remedy for fever.
I read an article about the potential benefits of quassia in improving liver health.

senses.definition: an evergreen fragrant bush of the mint family with narrow leaves that are used in cooking
a perennial herb with bitter-tasting leaves used for culinary and medicinal purposes

examples.x: He picked a few rue leaves from the garden to add to his soup for a touch of bitterness.
She brewed a cup of rue tea to soothe her upset stomach.

senses.definition: the scented greenish-gray leaves of a plant of the mint family, used as a culinary herb

examples.x: They believe in the healing properties of sage and use it in their homemade natural remedies and beauty products.
We enjoy garnishing our pasta dishes with a pinch of finely chopped sage.

senses.definition: a herb with a cucumber-like flavor often used in salads and dressings
a deciduous tree known for its aromatic bark and leaves, commonly used in traditional medicine and flavoring

examples.x: As the wind blew, the sweet scent of sassafras filled the air, creating a tranquil atmosphere.
She gathered some sassafras leaves and brewed herself a soothing cup of tea.

senses.definition: a herb known for its aromatic and peppery flavor, often used in culinary dishes

examples.x: She harvested fresh savory from her herb garden and dried it for future use in her favorite recipes.
We discovered a new recipe that called for a pinch of savory.
The recipe called for fresh savory to enhance the flavor of the roasted vegetables.
She added a pinch of dried savory to the stew for an extra burst of flavor.

senses.definition: a European plant that is from the dock family, the leaves of which add a sour taste to the food

examples.x: Emily planted sorrel in her backyard to attract butterflies.
Mark noticed the sorrel plant growing in his garden and decided to use it as a herbal medicine remedy.

senses.definition: the common garden mint that is used in making candy and toothpaste, from which an aromatic oil is extracted

examples.x: She enjoyed the cooling sensation of spearmint chewing gum as it freshened her breath.
You can enhance the flavor of your fruit salad by adding a few fresh spearmint leaves as a garnish.

senses.definition: an aromatic herb with fragrant roots commonly used in perfumes and traditional medicine

examples.x: He applied a few drops of spikenard oil to his temples, finding relief from his headache.
We walked through the garden, brushing against the spikenard plants and releasing their delightful scent into the air.

senses.definition: an aromatic plant of the daisy family, the narrow leaves of which are used in cooking

examples.x: She added a touch of tarragon to her creamy mushroom soup.
They decided to try a new recipe and used tarragon as a key ingredient in their homemade salad dressing.

senses.definition: a plant having small aromatic leaves used for flavoring food

examples.x: My son loves the aroma of thyme that fills the air whenever we bake a delicious pizza together.
She sprinkled fresh thyme over the roasted chicken to enhance its flavor with a hint of earthiness.
The recipe called for a teaspoon of dried thyme to add a fragrant, herbal note to the vegetable soup.
In her herb garden, she cultivated thyme alongside rosemary and basil, enjoying the aromatic trio in her cooking.

senses.definition: a herb or shrub with aromatic leaves that have a distinct minty flavor

examples.x: The aromatic wintergreen tea soothes her sore throat.

senses.definition: an herbaceous plant known for its sweet, hay-like fragrance and delicate white flowers

examples.x: As a herbalist, he grows woodruff in his backyard and uses it to create herbal remedies.
She loves to add woodruff to her homemade lemonade, giving it a unique and delightful taste.

senses.definition: a plant with bright orange or yellow flowers that produces seeds rich in oil

examples.x: As the sun set, the fields of safflower swayed gently in the breeze, creating a picturesque scene.
She planted safflower in her garden, hoping to extract oil from the seeds for cooking purposes.

senses.definition: a herb with small white flowers and a pleasant, soothing aroma

examples.x: Chamomile is often used as a natural remedy for stress and anxiety.
The herbalist recommended chamomile for digestive discomfort.
Chamomile has been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
The dried chamomile flowers smelled sweet and soothing.
